channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: What do you give an alien?
item.description:
What do you give an alien?
Some space!

item.title: How do the aliens get their babies to sleep?
item.description:
How do the aliens get their babies to sleep?
They ROCKET!

item.title: What holds the moon up?
item.description:
What holds the moon up?
Moon beams!

item.title: What do planets like to read?
item.description:
What do planets like to read?
Comet books!

item.title: what do you call a tick on the moon?
item.description:
what do you call a tick on the moon?
A luna-tick

item.title: What did the father tomato say to the baby tomato while out for a walk?
item.description:
What did the father tomato say to the baby tomato while out for a walk?
Ketchup!

item.title: What vegetables are sailors enemies?
item.description:
What vegetables are sailors enemies?
Leeks!

item.title: Why shouldn't you tell a secret on a farm?
item.description:
Why shouldn't you tell a secret on a farm?
Because the potatoes have eyes and the corns have ears!

item.title: What is the pretzel's favourite dance?
item.description:
What is the pretzel's favourite dance?
The twist!

item.title: What do elves make sandwiches with?
item.description:
What do elves make sandwiches with?
Shortbread!
